props.heading: Terms of Use
props.subheading: Last updated 7 July 2026, placeholder text pending legal review.

content.text: These terms govern your use of the Characom Group website. By browsing the site you accept them; if you do not, please do not use the site. We may update these terms from time to time, and the version published here applies from its stated date.

The site is provided for general information about Characom Group, its projects and its services. You agree not to misuse the site, including attempting to gain unauthorised access to its administration area, probing or disrupting its infrastructure, or submitting false, unlawful or abusive content through its forms.

Nothing on this site constitutes an offer capable of acceptance, a binding quotation, investment advice or professional engineering advice. Project descriptions, statistics and figures are provided for illustration; the terms of any engagement with Characom Group are those of a written contract signed by both parties, and nothing here forms part of one.

The Characom name, wordmark, texts, photography and design of this site are protected by copyright and trademark law and belong to Characom Group or their respective licensors. You may view and print pages for personal, non-commercial reference. Any other reproduction, distribution or use requires our prior written consent.

The site is provided "as is". While we keep its content accurate and current, we give no warranty that it is complete, error-free or uninterrupted, and we accept no liability for loss arising from reliance on it, to the fullest extent permitted by law. Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot lawfully be excluded.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Cyprus, and the courts of Nicosia have exclusive jurisdiction over any dispute arising from them or from your use of this site.
